# Copilot Instructions

## Projektrichtlinien
- User wants assistant to be familiar with [Facepunch Sbox Public](https://github.com/Facepunch/sbox-public) and the local repo at C:\Users\Niko\Documents\s&box projects\driver_z (remote [GAS1337/driver_z](https://github.com/GAS1337/driver_z)).
- Ignore binary model files in the assets folder when scanning.
- Preferred terminal shell: powershell.exe.
